profile.name: Manmohan S.
profile.title: Supply Chain Analyst
profile.bio: Supply chain analyst with 4+ years of experience supporting inventory planning, logistics coordination, procurement operations, warehouse reporting, and supply chain analytics. Uses Excel, SQL, Power BI, Python, and ERP data to improve reporting quality and operational visibility.
